name: Reyun
description: Chinese mobile attribution and game analytics platform with TrackingIO ad monitoring and GameAnalysis products.

seo.title: Reyun — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: Reyun: Chinese mobile attribution and game analytics platform with TrackingIO ad monitoring and GameAnalysis products.

when_to_use: Mobile attribution for Chinese app install campaigns via TrackingIO
Game analytics and LTV tracking for Chinese mobile games
Ad monitoring and fraud detection for China UA campaigns

pros: Dominant attribution position in Chinese app market
TrackingIO and GameAnalysis cover UA plus games
cons: Compliance and data-residency risk outside China
Privacy tooling not tuned to global regulations
review.verdict: Legitimate MMP for the Chinese app ecosystem, but effectively unusable for most Western advertisers.
review.best_for: Chinese mobile apps and games needing local MMP and ad monitoring at scale.
review.not_for: Global or Western apps with strict privacy, compliance and language requirements.
